title: Medical Genetics Doctoral Program Seminar
content:
Medical Genetics Doctoral Program Seminar

Dear Students,

Our Institute's Medical Genetics Doctoral Programme will host a seminar by Prof. Dr. Kemal Memişoğlu entitled "The Contribution of New Technologies such as Biotechnology and Artificial Intelligence in the Field of Health and the Importance of Regulations" as part of the Seminar course. We look forward to your participation in the seminar.

Sincerely
